headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains As Trump Says Iran War Is 'Very Complete;' Pharma Stock Dives (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones index came off lows on the stock market today. Oil prices surged on the U.S.-Iran war. Nvidia outperformed and Hims popped.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Skids As Oil Clears $100 On Iran War; This Hair Loss Play Tests Entry Point (Live Coverage)
summary: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index dived Monday as oil prices surged on the U.S.-Iran war. Nvidia and transport stocks dropped.
